positive: An aesthetically pleasing, minimalist representation of a celestial mountain range at sunrise. The mountains are rendered as clean, stylized silhouettes against a vibrant gradient sky. The colors should transition smoothly from deep indigo and violet at the zenith, through soft magentas, to bright, glowing gold and peach at the horizon. Include subtle, scattered clusters of luminous, abstract stars and crescent moons floating around the peaks. The composition should be centered, ensuring strong contrast between the dark foreground mountains and the vivid, luminous sky. High detail, vector art aesthetic, perfect for apparel print, clean edges, dramatic lighting, flat color areas.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, logo, low detail, grain, photorealism, graffiti, clutter
